'''pazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leeward|leeward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leeward|leeward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pazhate|pazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pazhatesher|pazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhatesherĂ«m|pazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazhatero|pazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazhateshĂ«|pazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhateshĂ«m|pazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazhatero|gokipazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazhateshĂ«|gokipazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhateshĂ«m|gokipazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopazhankerom|gopazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazhankeshĂ«|gopazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhankeshĂ«m|gopazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopazhankeya|gopazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazhaterom|pazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhatemu|pazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pazhateya|pazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazhaterom|gokipazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhatemu|gokipazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipazhateya|gokipazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pazhazhate|pazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pazhazhatesher|pazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhazhatesherĂ«m|pazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazhazhatero|pazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazhazhateshĂ«|pazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhazhateshĂ«m|pazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazhazhatero|gokipazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazhazhateshĂ«|gokipazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhazhateshĂ«m|gokipazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopazhazhankerom|gopazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazhazhankeshĂ«|gopazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhazhankeshĂ«m|gopazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopazhazhankeya|gopazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazhazhaterom|pazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhazhatemu|pazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pazhazhateya|pazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazhazhaterom|gokipazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhazhatemu|gokipazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipazhazhateya|gokipazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠte|pĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠtesher|pĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠtero|pĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokipĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠterom|pĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠtemu|pĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠzhĂŠteya|pĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokipĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokipĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafzhafte|pafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafzhaftesher|pafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzhaftesherĂ«m|pafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafzhaftero|pafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafzhafteshĂ«|pafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzhafteshĂ«m|pafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafzhaftero|gokipafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafzhafteshĂ«|gokipafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafzhafteshĂ«m|gokipafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafzhafnkerom|gopafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafzhafnkeshĂ«|gopafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gopafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafzhafnkeya|gopafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafzhafterom|pafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzhaftemu|pafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafzhafteya|pafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafzhafterom|gokipafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafzhaftemu|gokipafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafzhafteya|gokipafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
